common.debug_notification_details: Details: open the report file (text + JSON appendix).

invalid_config_entry.message: Config entry "{config_entry}" was not found or is not a DeepSeek Conversation entry.

user.title: DeepSeek API Configuration
user.description: Connect to the DeepSeek API. Default model is DeepSeek V4 Flash. Legacy names deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner still work but are removed after 2026-07-24 — switch to V4 in options when ready.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate DeepSeek
reauth_confirm.description: Your DeepSeek API key was rejected. Enter a valid API key to restore the integration.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure DeepSeek
reconfigure.description: Update your API key or base URL. Assist and model settings stay unchanged.

abort.config_entry_not_available: The config entry is no longer available.
abort.reconfigure_started: Opening API key and base URL settings.

init.title: DeepSeek Options
init.description: Choose what you want to change.

assist.title: DeepSeek Options
assist.description: DeepSeek V4 uses one model for chat and reasoning. With reasoning on, the API sends thinking (extra_body) and reasoning effort; temperature and top_p are ignored. With reasoning off, temperature and top_p apply. All fields stay in this form so you can switch without reopening. Legacy model IDs work until 2026-07-24.

generate_content.name: Generate content
generate_content.description: Send a conversational prompt to DeepSeek and return the model reply.

config_entry.name: Integration entry
config_entry.description: DeepSeek Conversation config entry to use.

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: User message sent to the model.

filenames.name: File paths
filenames.description: Optional local image paths (must be allowed in allowlist_external_dirs).

run_debug.name: Run DeepSeek debug suite
run_debug.description: Exhaustive diagnostics: environment, HTTP probe, optional models.list, registered HA LLM APIs, entity registry, many non-stream and stream completion checks (thinking on/off, system message, multi-turn, JSON mode, parallel pings), log excerpt, and a JSON appendix in the report file. Many short API calls; writes /config/deepseek_conversation_debug_report.txt and a brief notification (summary + failures).

config_entry.name: Integration entry
config_entry.description: DeepSeek Conversation config entry to test.

log_tail_lines.name: Log excerpt size
log_tail_lines.description: Filtered log lines appended from home-assistant.log (default 600, allowed 50–8000).
